summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of Fruitee social media campaign management platform. Tested auth flows (business/influencer registration and login), profile pages, preferences/onboarding, brands CRUD, and campaigns CRUD. Fixed 3 bugs during testing.

minor.issue: Returns error if brand_positioning, audience_type, or other array fields are empty. Frontend should validate these fields before submission.

integration_issues.issue: If user doesn't select all required fields (categories, tones, pillars, audiences, regions), API returns error. Frontend should validate required selections before submit.

action_items: Add frontend validation on BusinessPreferencesPage to ensure at least one item is selected for: categories, tones, pillars (brand_positioning), audiences, and regions before allowing submission
Add frontend validation on InfluencerPreferencesPage for the same required fields
critical_code_review_comments: BrandsPage.jsx and BrandCampaignsPage.jsx were using wrong response format (data.items instead of data.result) - FIXED
api.js had error handling issue where response body could be read twice causing 'body stream already read' error - FIXED
test_credentials: Test users created with pattern test_*_{timestamp}@test.com, password: TestPass123!
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing (business and influencer roles)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows working: signup, login, profile update, preferences/onboarding, brands CRUD, campaigns CRUD. The external API at http://18.135.75.87:8000 is proxied through the FastAPI backend. API response format uses 'result' key for list data (not 'items'). Business onboarding requires all array fields to be non-empty.
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent: Fixed BrandsPage.jsx to handle API response format (data.result instead of data.items)
Fixed BrandCampaignsPage.jsx to handle API response format (data.result instead of data.items)
Fixed api.js error handling to prevent 'body stream already read' error
